request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - our county's emergency preparedness budget got cut by 15% last year, and now they're struggling to maintain basic civil defense infrastructure. As someone who values order and duty, I find this concerning. We can't afford to be unprepared when emergencies strike. #CommunitySafety #NationalSecurity
